name: DIC India Limited
summary: DIC India Limited manufactures and sells printing inks in India. It operates in two segments, Printing Inks and Lamination Adhesives. The company offers offset inks, gravure inks, flexo inks, can coatings, news inks, and packaging adhesives; lamination adhesives; UV and water based varnishes; packaging solutions; chemical solution materials, including fine chemicals, polymers, compounds, and application materials; and value added services to the printing fraternity. It serves newspapers, magazines, packaging, and printing establishments, as well as other publications industries. The company was formerly known as Coates of India Limited and changed its name to DIC India Limited in August 2004. DIC India Limited was founded in 1937 and is based in Noida, India. DIC India Limited is a subsidiary of DIC Asia Pacific Pte Limited.
